scripts.build:windows: node scripts/setup-node-sidecar.js --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:linux: node scripts/setup-node-sidecar.js --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:mac-intel: node scripts/setup-node-sidecar.js --target x86_64-apple-darwin && tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:mac-arm: node scripts/setup-node-sidecar.js --target aarch64-apple-darwin && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
